user.title: Fanpy Pro — Mode
user.description: Choose how this fan is controlled.

area.title: Fanpy Pro — Area
area.description: Select the area where the fan is located. The name and prefix will be auto-generated. If the area doesn't exist, create it in Settings > Areas and restart the wizard.

data.fan_number: Fan number (1 = first fan in this area, 2 = second, ...)

direct_entity.title: Fanpy Pro — Fan & Speeds
direct_entity.description: Select the switch entity that controls this fan and set the number of speeds.

direct_light.title: Fanpy Pro — Light
direct_light.description: Does this fan have a light?

direct_light_entity.title: Fanpy Pro — Light Entity
direct_light_entity.description: Select the light entity that controls this fan's light.

helpers_speeds.title: Fanpy Pro — Speeds
helpers_speeds.description: Set the number of speeds this fan has.

helpers_light.title: Fanpy Pro — Light
helpers_light.description: Does this fan have a light?

helpers_timer.title: Fanpy Pro — Timer
helpers_timer.description: Select the number of timers. Timers must be created manually using Home Assistant's timer helper ('Settings' > 'Helpers' > 'Timer'). The card will show this many timer buttons.

helpers_timer_direct.title: Fanpy Pro — Timer
helpers_timer_direct.description: Select the number of timers. Timers must be created manually using Home Assistant's timer helper ('Settings' > 'Helpers' > 'Timer'). The card will show this many timer buttons.

helpers_gateway.title: Fanpy Pro — RF Gateway
helpers_gateway.description: Select the ESP32 gateway that controls this fan. The available gateways are detected from the YAML files in fanpypro_codes/.

helpers_broadlink_choice.title: Fanpy Pro — Broadlink
helpers_broadlink_choice.description: Do you want to use a Broadlink device as transmitter? The RF gateway will keep receiving signals from the physical remote to synchronize state.

helpers_broadlink_config.title: Fanpy Pro — Broadlink Configuration
helpers_broadlink_config.description: Configure the Broadlink device and the remote commands for each function.

error.invalid_speeds: Number of speeds must be between 1 and 10
